examples: There is one catch: Bayard writes in French. Of course, that hardly matters as, by definition, you're not going to crack the spine.
Bayard, a 52-year-old professor of literature and a psychoanalyst, has gotten this far without ever having picked up "Oliver Twist" or finished "Ulysses."
Land's End had once belonged to New York journalist (and keen 1920s party-giver) Herbert Bayard Swope.
"Maybe it's been a little more civil, " said Mike Bayard, who volunteers for Kelly.
Mr. LOUIS BAYARD (Author): To me, the experience of gay Republicans is emblematic of that.
